DECLARATION OF CHARLES BOATWRIGHT RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOATWRIGHT, CHARLES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES BOATWRIGHT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SALA & SALA INC'S OWNER GREGORY SKINNER VIA COURT CALL TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS (RECEIVED IN MAIL PRIOR TO HEARING DATE) RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOATWRIGHT, CHARLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALA & SALA, INC. $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $390.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
